videos.headline: Georgia wins SEC title on injured Beck handoff to Etienne in OT
videos.description: An injured Carson Beck hands it off to Trevor Etienne in overtime, who dives into the end zone, giving Georgia another SEC title.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia wins SEC title on injured Beck hand off to Etienne in OT) 2024/12/7 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia's Daylen Everette gets an INT off a deflection
videos.description: Georgia gets a turnover as Daylen Everette keeps his eyes on the ball after the deflection for the pick.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia's Daylen Everette gets an INT off a deflection) 2024/12/7 ESHEET

videos.headline: Silas Bolden goes up and snags the impressive catch
videos.description: Silas Bolden leaps and hauls in the catch for a huge gain to end the first quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Silas Bolden goes up and snags the impressive catch) 2024/12/7 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas snaps ball through Arch Manning's legs, converts on 4th
videos.description: Texas converts the fourth-and-short after a trick play that starts with snapping the ball through Arch Manning's legs.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas snaps ball through Arch Manning’s legs, converts on 4th) 2024/12/7 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carson Beck takes big hit, chaotic first-half ending ensues
videos.description: Carson Beck is sacked and fumbles, leading to a chaotic play and the quarterback being helped off the field.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carson Beck takes big hit, chaotic first-half ending ensues) 2024/12/7 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia's Lawson Luckie just keeps foot in bounds for amazing catch
videos.description: Georgia gets the first down as Lawson Luckie gets the foot barely in for a great catch.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia’s Lawson Luckie just keeps foot in bounds for amazing catch) 2024/12/7 ESHEET

videos.headline: Trevor Etienne scores powerful TD for a Georgia lead
videos.description: Georgia takes the lead as Trevor Etienne drags tacklers into the end zone for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Trevor Etienne scores powerful TD for a Georgia lead) 2024/12/7 ESHEET

videos.headline: DeAndre Moore Jr. speeds away for a Texas TD
videos.description: Texas evens it up as Quinn Ewers throws short to DeAndre Moore Jr. who then takes off for a 41-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (DeAndre Moore Jr. speeds away for a Texas TD) 2024/12/7 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia's fake punt works to perfection
videos.description: Georgia keeps their fourth-quarter drive going as they fake the punt for a big gain.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia’s fake punt works to perfection) 2024/12/7 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ewers throws costly INT in the fourth quarter
videos.description: Quinn Ewers is picked off by Daylen Everette late in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ewers throws costly INT in the fourth quarter) 2024/12/7 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gunner Stockton gives it right back to Texas with an INT
videos.description: Gunner Stockton looks to throw it away and ends up throwing it right to Texas' Jahdae Barron for an interception.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gunner Stockton gives it right back to Texas with an INT) 2024/12/7 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bert Auburn comes up clutch with game-tying FG for Texas
videos.description: Bert Auburn puts through the game-tying field goal with under 20 seconds remaining in the fourth quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bert Auburn comes up clutch with game-tying FG for Texas) 2024/12/7 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas' Andrew Mukuba lays the boom on punishing hit in OT
videos.description: Georgia QB Gunner Stockton scrambles for a first down, but gets flattened by Texas' Andrew Mukuba before the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas' Andrew Mukuba lays the boom on punishing hit in OT) 2024/12/07 ESHEET
